name: Fried Meatballs
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix all ingredients together and form balls.
2. Coat a large skillet with non-stick olive oil spray.
3. Fry meatballs for about 10 minutes or until nice and brown.
4. Store in an airtight container and refrigerate until ready to use, or drop immediately into tomato sauce and cook until the sauce is heated through.
